chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-25 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 1101/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asfaydyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate has filed power as well as comments on behalf of respondent No.5; a copy of comments is supplied to learned counsel for petitioner. Learned AAG is directed to call comments from respondent No.2 and proposal to resolve the issue. Adjourned to 02.04.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 02.04.2024. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-262 of 2016 Const. Petition No.D-4676 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on CMA 13131/2015 2.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 None present for the petitioners in both matters. Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondents-SIDA. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioners are called absent. Learned counsel for respondents- SIDA and learned AAG submit that petitioners themselves are involved in theft of water and are in illegal occupation of the government land; against whom various FIRs have been registered and these petitions have been filed only to blackmail and put pressure upon the SIDA officials. Be that as it may. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, these petitions along with pending application(s) are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2940 of 2016 Const. Petition No.D-4396 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on CMA 383/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Safdar Kamal, Law Officer, NADRA-Respondents. Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. ***** Law Officer, NADRA has filed comments; a copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner who seeks time to go through the same. Adjourned to 28.03.2024. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision Application No. D- 01 of 2020 Crl. Appeal No. D- 311 of 2019 Crl. Appeal No. D- 312 of 2019 Crl. Appeal No. D- 313 of 2019 Crl. Appeal No. D- 314 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing of Main Case 27-02-2024 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for applicant/complainant. M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan and Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocates for applicants in appeals and for respondents in connected revision application. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Additional P.G for the State. ***** At the request of Mr. Shar, matters are adjourned to 27.03.2024. Meanwhile, jail roll be called for from the jail authorities. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
